-- The extension 0 → T → M → M/T → 0 defines a class in Ext¹(M/T, T).
  -- For any height 1 prime p, Aₚ is a PID (by HeightOneLocalizationIsPID).
  -- Over a PID, any finitely generated module splits as T ⊕ F, where F is free.
  -- Since (M/T)ₚ is torsion-free over a PID, it is free (projective), so the extension splits locally.
  -- Thus, the extension class is trivial locally at all height 1 primes.
  -- This implies the support of the extension class has height ≥ 2, so it is pseudo-null.
  -- Therefore, the extension splits up to pseudo-isomorphism.
  sorry

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isIso_at_heightOne fun p hp ↦ ?_
  have : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) ⟨p, rfl⟩ (Set.toFinite _)).2
  exact ⟨Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M)⟩

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isIsomorphic_on_height_one_primes fun p hp ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨_, hPID⟩ := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization
    {p} (by simpa) ⟨p, rfl⟩ (Set.finite_singleton _)
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  let M' := LocalizedModule S M
  let T' := Submodule.torsion (Localization S) M'
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := hPID
  haveI : Module.Finite (Localization S) M' := Module.Finite_of_isLocalization S M M'
  have : Module.Free (Localization S) (M' ⧸ T') :=
    Module.free_of_finite_type_torsion_free'
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := Module.Projective.exists_splitting_of_surjective
    (Submodule.mkQ T') (Submodule.mkQ_surjective T')
  refine ⟨(LinearEquiv.ofLeftInverseOfRightInverse (LinearMap.coprod T'.subtype g.some)
    (fun x ↦ ⟨x - g.some (Submodule.mkQ T' x), by
      rw [← Submodule.mkQ_eq_zero T', Submodule.mkQ_sub, hg, sub_self]⟩)
    (by
      intro x; ext; simp only [LinearMap.coprod_apply, Submodule.coe_subtype, Submodule.mkQ_add,
        hg, Submodule.mkQ_coe, add_zero, Prod.mk_add_mk, add_sub_cancel_right])
    (by
      intro x; simp only [LinearMap.coprod_apply, Submodule.coe_subtype, Submodule.mkQ_add, hg,
        Submodule.mkQ_coe, add_zero])).symm.trans ?_⟩
  refine LinearEquiv.prodCongr (Submodule.localized_torsion S M).symm ?_
  refine (LinearEquiv.ofBijective (LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M)))
    ⟨?_, ?_⟩).symm.trans (Submodule.quotEquivOfEq _ _ <| by
      rw [Submodule.ker_mkQ]; exact (Submodule.localized_torsion_map_ker S M).symm)
  · rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot, LocalizedModule.map_ker, Submodule.ker_mkQ,
      Submodule.localized_torsion_map_ker]
  · rw [← LinearMap.range_eq_top, LocalizedModule.map_range, Submodule.range_mkQ,
      LocalizedModule.map_top]

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_locally_isomorphic_on_height_one_primes fun p hp ↦ ?_
  let P := p.1.primeCompl
  have hP : P ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors
  let S := Localization P
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing S := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp) (by simp) (by simp)).2
  haveI : Module.Finite S (LocalizedModule P M) := Module.Finite_of_isLocalization P M S
  obtain ⟨F', hF'⟩ := Submodule.exists_isCompl_torsion_of_isPrincipalIdealRing (LocalizedModule P M)
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  refine (Submodule.prodEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hF').symm.trans ?_
  refine (Submodule.torsion_localizedModule_equiv hP M).prod ?_
  refine (LinearEquiv.ofIsCompl _ _ hF').trans ?_
  refine (Submodule.quotientEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hF').trans ?_
  rw [Submodule.torsion_localized hP M]
  exact (Submodule.Quotient.localizedModuleEquiv P (Submodule.torsion A M)).symm

refine IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_locally_isomorphic_on_height_one_primes fun p hp ↦ ?_
  obtain ⟨_, h⟩ := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization (A := A) {p} (by simpa) (Set.singleton_nonempty p) (Set.Finite.singleton p)
  rw [iInf_singleton] at h
  haveI := h
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  let f : LocalizedModule S M →ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M) :=
    LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.mkQ _)
  have : Module.Free (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) :=
    Module.free_of_torsionFree _
  let g := f.rightInverse_of_surjective (LocalizedModule.map_surjective S _ (Submodule.mkQ_surjective _))
  refine ⟨(LinearEquiv.ofSplit f g (f.rightInverse_of_surjective_apply _)).trans (LinearEquiv.prod ?_ (LinearEquiv.refl _ _))⟩
  refine LinearEquiv.trans ?_ (LocalizedModule.ker_map_equiv S (Submodule.mkQ _))
  exact LocalizedModule.map_equiv S (Submodule.ker_mkQ _)

refine Module.pseudoIsomorphic_of_pseudoNull_Ext _ _ (fun p hp ↦ ?_)
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  haveI : IsDomain (Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).1
  exact Module.Ext_zero_of_isPrincipalIdealRing _ _

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isIsomorphic_on_height_one_spectrum fun p hp ↦ ?_
  haveI := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization (A := A) {p}
    (Set.singleton_subset_iff.2 hp) (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2

apply Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isLocallyIsomorphic_at_height_one
  intro p hp
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) ⟨p, rfl⟩ (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  refine (Submodule.torsion_isDirectSummand (LocalizedModule S M)).equivProd.symm.trans ?_
  refine LinearEquiv.prodCongr ?_ ?_
  · exact Submodule.torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M
  · refine (LocalizedModule.quotientEquiv S (Submodule.torsion A M)).trans ?_
    exact Submodule.Quotient.equiv _ _ (Submodule.torsion_localizedModule S M).symm

rw [Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule]
  intro p hp
  obtain ⟨hDom, hPID⟩ := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization (A := A) {p}
    (by simpa using hp) (Set.singleton_nonempty p) (Set.finite_singleton p)
  simp only [Set.iInf_singleton] at hDom hPID
  haveI := hPID
  haveI := hDom
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  let f := LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M))
  have hf : Function.Surjective f := LocalizedModule.map_surjective S _ (Submodule.mkQ_surjective _)
  have : Module.IsTorsionFree (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) :=
    Module.IsTorsionFree.localization S _ inferInstance
  have : Module.Free (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) :=
    Module.free_of_torsion_free' _
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := Module.Free.exists_rightInverse_of_surjective f hf
  refine (LinearEquiv.ofRightInverse f g hg).trans (LinearEquiv.prodCongr ?_ (LinearEquiv.refl _ _))
  rw [LocalizedModule.ker_map, Submodule.ker_mkQ]
  exact LinearEquiv.ofInjective (LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.torsion A M).subtype)
    (LocalizedModule.map_injective S _ (Submodule.subtype_injective _))

refine Module.IsPseudoIsomorphic.of_iso_on_height_one_primes fun p hp ↦ ?_
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) (by simp) (by simp)).2
  obtain ⟨T', hT'⟩ := Submodule.exists_isCompl_torsion_of_isPrincipalIdealRing (LocalizedModule S M)
  exact ⟨(Submodule.prodEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hT').trans <| LinearEquiv.prodCongr
    (Module.torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M).symm
    ((Submodule.Quotient.equiv _ _ (LinearEquiv.refl _ _) hT'.right_eq_bot).trans
      (Module.quotient_torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M).symm)⟩

let T := Submodule.torsion A M
  let F := M ⧸ T
  let s := (Module.support A T) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  have hs : s.Finite := Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support (Submodule.isTorsion_torsion A M)
  rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hn
  · refine ⟨LinearMap.prod (Submodule.subtype T) (Submodule.mkQ T), ?_⟩
    intro p hp
    have : p ∉ Module.support A T := fun h ↦ (Set.not_mem_empty p) ⟨h, hp⟩
    rw [Module.notMem_support_iff, Submodule.localizedModule_eq_bot_iff] at this
    simp only [this, LocalizedModule.map_prod, LocalizedModule.map_subtype, LocalizedModule.map_mkQ,
      LinearMap.prod_zero_left, LinearMap.ker_comp, LinearMap.range_comp, Submodule.ker_subtype, Submodule.ker_mkQ,
      Submodule.range_subtype, Submodule.range_mkQ, Submodule.comap_bot, Submodule.map_top, Submodule.map_bot]
    rw [LinearMap.isIso_iff_ker_eq_bot_and_range_eq_top]
    constructor
    · rw [Submodule.localizedModule_eq_bot_iff]
      intro x hx
      obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := Submodule.mkQ_surjective T x
      simp only [Submodule.mkQ_apply, Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero] at hx
      exact this y hx
    · rw [Submodule.localizedModule_eq_top_iff]
      intro x
      obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := Submodule.mkQ_surjective T x
      exact ⟨y, rfl⟩
  · let S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s Set.inter_subset_right hn hs).2
    let f : LocalizedModule S M ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S T × LocalizedModule S F :=
      letI : Module.Free (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S F) := Module.free_of_finite_type_torsion_free'
        (Module.Finite_of_isLocalization _ _ _)
        (Module.IsTorsion.torsion_free_localizedModule_of_torsion_free S (Submodule.torsion_free _ _))
      (LinearEquiv.symm <| (LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.mkQ T)).splitSurjective_of_isFree
        (LocalizedModule.map_surjective S (Submodule.mkQ T) (Submodule.mkQ_surjective T)))
      ≪≫ₗ (LinearEquiv.prodCongr (LinearEquiv.ofInjective (LocalizedModule.map S (Submodule.subtype T))
        (LocalizedModule.map_injective S (Submodule.subtype T) (Submodule.subtype_injective T))) LinearEquiv.refl _ _)
    obtain ⟨g, ⟨u, hu⟩, hg⟩ := (LocalizedModule.is_localization S).exists_linearMap_eq_of_isLocalization (f.toLinearMap : _ →ₗ[Localization S] _)
    refine ⟨g, fun p hp ↦ ?_⟩
    by_cases hps : p ∈ s
    · have : p.1.primeCompl ≤ S := iInf_le_of_le p <| iInf_le_of_le hps le_rfl
      have : IsLocalization p.1.primeCompl (Localization S) :=
        IsLocalization.isLocalization_of_isLocalization_isLocalization S p.1.primeCompl (Localization S) this
      let e : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl T × LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl F :=
        { __ := (LocalizedModule.iso p.1.primeCompl f).trans (LocalizedModule.prod p.1.primeCompl _ _),
          map_smul' := fun _ _ ↦ rfl }
      suffices IsUnit (algebraMap (Localization p.1.primeCompl) (Localization (Localization p.1.primeCompl)) (algebraMap _ _ u)) by
        refine (LinearEquiv.isIso_iff_bijective _).2 <| Function.Bijective.of_comp_iff _ (this.isUnit_map _).bijective |>.1 <| (LinearEquiv.isIso_iff_bijective _).1 e.isIso
        rw [← LinearMap.map_smul, ← Module.algebraMap_end_apply, ← LocalizedModule.mk_linearMap_apply, hg]
        rfl
      exact IsLocalization.map_units _ ⟨u, hu⟩
    · have : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl T = 0 :=
        Module.IsTorsion.localizedModule_eq_bot_of_primeHeight_one_not_mem_support (Submodule.isTorsion_torsion A M) hp hps
      rw [this, Prod.zero_mk_left, ← LinearMap.isIso_iff_bijective,
        show LinearMap.isIso (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (Submodule.mkQ T)) from
          (LocalizedModule.map_isIso p.1.primeCompl (Submodule.mkQ T)).2 ⟨(Submodule.mkQ_surjective T).localizedModule p.1.primeCompl,
          (LocalizedModule.ker_map p.1.primeCompl (Submodule.mkQ T)).symm ▸ (Submodule.ker_mkQ T).symm ▸
          (Submodule.localizedModule_eq_bot_iff _ _).2 fun x hx ↦
            by_contra fun h ↦ hps ⟨Module.mem_support_of_mem_prime_of_not_zero hx (by simpa using hp), hp⟩⟩]
      suffices (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (Prod.snd ∘ g)) =
          LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (Submodule.mkQ T) ∘ₗ (Module.algebraMap_end _ (algebraMap _ _ u)) by
        rw [this, LinearMap.isIso_comp_iff, Module.algebraMap_end_isIso_iff]
        exact IsLocalization.to_units _ ⟨u, hu⟩
      apply (LocalizedModule.is_localization S).linearMap_injective_of_isLocalization (M := LocalizedModule S M)
      simp only [LocalizedModule.map_comp, LinearMap.comp_assoc, ← LocalizedModule.map_smul, ← Module.algebraMap_end_apply,
        ← LocalizedModule.mk_linearMap_apply, hg, f, LinearEquiv.trans_toLinearMap, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearEquiv.coe_coe,
        LinearEquiv.prodCongr_apply, LinearEquiv.refl_apply, Prod.snd_mk]
      rw [LinearEquiv.splitSurjective_of_isFree_apply_fst, LocalizedModule.map_mkQ]

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_locally_isomorphic_at_height_one fun p hp ↦ ?_
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)
      ⟨p, rfl⟩ (Set.finite_singleton p)).2
  exact ⟨Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M)⟩

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isIso_at_height_one_primes A M _ fun p hp ↦ ?_
  rw [Ideal.primeHeight_eq_one_iff] at hp
  set S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization (Set.singleton p)
      (by simpa using hp) (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  haveI : Module.Finite (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) :=
    Module.Finite_of_isLocalization _ _ _
  obtain ⟨K, hK⟩ := Submodule.exists_isCompl_torsion_of_isPrincipalIdealRing
    (R := Localization S) (M := LocalizedModule S M)
  refine ⟨(Submodule.equivDirectSumOfIsCompl hK).trans (LinearEquiv.prodCongr ?_ ?_)⟩
  · exact (Submodule.torsionLocalizationEquiv S M).symm
  · exact (Submodule.quotientEquivOfIsCompl _ hK).symm.trans
      (LocalizedModule.quotientTorsionEquiv S M).symm

rw [Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_locally_isomorphic]
  intro p hp
  obtain ⟨_, _⟩ := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization
    (s := {p}) (by simpa) (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)
  let S := Localization p.asIdeal.primeCompl
  have : Module.Free S (LocalizedModule p.asIdeal.primeCompl (M ⧸ Submodule.torsion A M)) :=
    Module.free_of_finite_type_torsion_free'
  let f := LocalizedModule.map p.asIdeal.primeCompl (Submodule.mkQ (Submodule.torsion A M))
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := f.splitSurjectiveOfIsProjective
  let e₁ := LinearEquiv.ofInjective _ (LocalizedModule.map_injective _ _ (Submodule.subtype_injective _))
  let e₂ := LinearEquiv.ofEq _ _ (LocalizedModule.ker_map_mkQ _ _).symm
  exact ⟨(LinearEquiv.ofSplit f g hg).trans <|
    (LinearEquiv.prod (e₁.trans e₂) (LinearEquiv.refl _ _)).trans
    (LocalizedModule.prodEquiv _ _ _).symm⟩

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isomorphism_at_height_one_primes fun p hp ↦ ?_
  haveI := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) (by simp) (by simp)).2
  exact ⟨(Submodule.equivProdTorsion (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M)).symm⟩

apply Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isomorphic_at_height_one_primes
  intro p hp
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  let T := Submodule.torsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M)
  obtain ⟨F, hF⟩ := Submodule.exists_isCompl T
  refine ⟨(Submodule.prodEquivOfIsCompl T F hF).symm.trans (LinearEquiv.prodCongr ?_ ?_)⟩
  · exact (LocalizedModule.torsion A M S).symm
  · refine (LocalizedModule.quotientTorsion A M S).symm.trans (Submodule.quotientEquivOfIsCompl T F hF).symm

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_forall_primeHeight_le_one_localizedModule_equiv fun p hp ↦ ?_
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization _ (Set.subset_singleton _)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  obtain ⟨F, hF⟩ := Submodule.exists_isCompl_torsion (R := Localization S) (M := LocalizedModule S M)
  refine ⟨(Submodule.prodEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hF).symm.trans (LinearEquiv.prodCongr ?_ ?_)⟩
  · exact Submodule.torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M
  · refine (Submodule.quotientEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hF).symm.trans (Submodule.quotient_torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M).symm

refine isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_locally_isomorphic.mpr fun p hp ↦ ?_
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := Submodule.exists_isCompl_torsion_of_isPrincipalIdealRing (LocalizedModule S M)
  refine ⟨(Submodule.equivProdOfIsCompl _ _ _ hC).trans <|
    (LinearEquiv.prod (Submodule.localizedTorsion S M).symm
      ((Submodule.quotientEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hC).trans
      (Submodule.localizedQuotientTorsion S M).symm)).trans (LocalizedModule.prodEquiv S _ _).symm⟩

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isIso_at_prime_height_one A M _ (fun p hp ↦ ?_)
  haveI := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)

  · exact (Submodule.torsion_localizedModule_equiv p.1.primeCompl M).symm

      · rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]; intro x; use 1, Submonoid.one_mem _; simp

      refine (Submodule.Quotient.isPseudoIso_iff_subsingleton _ _).mp ?_ p hp
      rw [isPseudoIsomorphism_iff]; simp only [true_and]
      rw [Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
      intro p' hp'
      rw [Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem] at this
      have := this p' ⟨Module.mem_support_of_mem_prime_of_not_zero (x := Submodule.torsion A M) ?_, hp'⟩
      · rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]; exact fun x ↦ ⟨1, Submonoid.one_mem _, by simpa using x.2⟩
      · rw [LocalizedModule.subsingleton_iff]; intro x; use 1, Submonoid.one_mem _; simp
  · let S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
      (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (Set.inter_subset_right _ _) hn hs).2
    let f : LocalizedModule S M ≃ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule S T × LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ T) := by
      let I : LocalizedModule S T ≃ₗ[Localization S] Submodule.torsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) :=
        (LocalizedModule.torsion_linearEquiv_torsion_localizedModule S M).symm
      let J : LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ T) ≃ₗ[Localization S] (LocalizedModule S M) ⧸ Submodule.torsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) :=
        (LocalizedModule.map_quotient_equiv S T).trans (Submodule.Quotient.equiv (LocalizedModule S M) _ _ I.symm.range_eq_torsion)
      refine (Module.equiv_prod_of_isTorsion_of_free _ _ _ ?_ ?_).trans (I.symm.prod J.symm)
      · rw [← J.range_eq_top, LinearEquiv.range_eq_top, ← Submodule.torsion_eq_bot_iff]
        exact Submodule.torsion_quotient_torsion _ _
      · have : Module.Finite (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ T)) :=
           Module.Finite_of_isLocalization S (M ⧸ T) _
        have : Module.Free (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ T)) :=
           Module.free_of_finite_type_torsion_free'
        exact this
    obtain ⟨g, ⟨u, hu⟩, hg⟩ := LocalizedModule.mk_linearMap_of_fraction S f.toLinearMap
    refine ⟨g, ?_⟩
    rw [isPseudoIsomorphism_iff, Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton,
      Module.isPseudoNull_iff_primeHeight_le_one_imp_subsingleton]
    refine ⟨fun p hp ↦ ?_, fun p hp ↦ ?_⟩
    all_goals
      have hSp : S ≤ p.1.primeCompl := by
        intro x hx; rw [Submonoid.mem_iInf] at hx; by_cases h : p ∈ s
        · exact hx p h
        · rw [Set.mem_inter_iff, not_and_or] at h
          rcases h with h | h
          · have : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl T = 0 := by
              rw [LocalizedModule.eq_zero_iff]
              intro m; obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite T).not.mp h m
              exact ⟨n, hn.1, hn.2⟩
            rw [LinearMap.ker_eq_bot.mpr, LinearMap.range_eq_top.mpr]
            · exact (inferInstance : Subsingleton (0 : Type _))
            · apply (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M ⧸ T) (S := S) p.1.primeCompl hSp).isIso_iff_bijective.mp
              refine ⟨fun x y e ↦ ?_, fun y ↦ ?_⟩
              · rw [← Submodule.mkQ_apply, LocalizedModule.mk_eq_mk] at e ⊢; obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := e
                refine ⟨c, hc.1, ?_⟩; rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero, ← Submodule.mkQ_apply]
                rw [← Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero, ← Submodule.mkQ_apply] at hc; simpa using hc.2
              · obtain ⟨⟨y, ⟨d, hd⟩⟩⟩ := y; use LocalizedModule.mk y ⟨d, hd⟩; rfl
            · rw [LinearMap.ker_eq_bot]; intro m hm
              apply (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M) (S := S) p.1.primeCompl hSp).isIso_iff_bijective.mp.1
              apply (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M ⧸ T) (S := S) p.1.primeCompl hSp).isIso_iff_bijective.mp.1
              simp only [map_zero]; change LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (LinearMap.snd _ _ ∘ g) m = 0
              rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, hm, map_zero]
          · exact (h hp).elim
      have : IsLocalization.AtPrime (Localization p.1.primeCompl) p.1 := Localization.isLocalization
      let F : LocalizedModule S M →ₗ[Localization S] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M :=
        LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization S p.1.primeCompl hSp
      let G : LocalizedModule S T × LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ T) →ₗ[Localization S]
          LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl T × LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl (M ⧸ T) :=
        LinearMap.prod
          ((LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization S p.1.primeCompl hSp).toLinearMap.comp (LinearMap.fst _ _ _))
          ((LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization S p.1.primeCompl hSp).toLinearMap.comp (LinearMap.snd _ _ _))
      have eq : G ∘ₗ f.toLinearMap = (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl g) ∘ₗ F := by
        apply LocalizedModule.linearMap_ext S; intro m
        simp only [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearEquiv.coe_coe, F, G, LinearMap.prod_apply,
          LinearMap.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, LinearMap.fst_apply, LinearMap.snd_apply,
          LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization_apply, LocalizedModule.map_mk,
          hg, LocalizedModule.mk_smul_mk, one_mul]
        rw [LocalizedModule.mk_eq_mk']; apply LocalizedModule.eq_by_localization_map_eq p.1.primeCompl
        rw [LocalizedModule.map_mk, LocalizedModule.map_smul, LocalizedModule.map_mk,
           ← LocalizedModule.mk_smul_mk, one_mul, LocalizedModule.mk_cancel_common_right]
        exact hu
      have : Function.Bijective (LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl g) := by
        rw [Bijective_iff_exists_iso]; use (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := T) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).isIso_iff_bijective).symm.prod
          (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M ⧸ T) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).isIso_iff_bijective).symm ≪≫ₗ
          (LinearEquiv.ofBijective G (by
            constructor
            · intro x hx; ext
              · apply (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := T) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).injective; simpa using congr_arg Prod.fst hx
              · apply (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M ⧸ T) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).injective; simpa using congr_arg Prod.snd hx
            · intro y; obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := T) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).surjective y.1
              obtain ⟨q, hq⟩ := (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M ⧸ T) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).surjective y.2
              use (t, q); ext <;> simp [ht, hq])).symm ≪≫ₗ
          (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ f.bijective).symm ≪≫ₗ
          (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ (LocalizedModule.map_iso_of_isLocalization_localization (M := M) S p.1.primeCompl hSp).isIso_iff_bijective) ≪≫ₗ
          (LinearEquiv.ofBijective _ (by
            rw [← LinearMap.isIso_iff_bijective, ← eq]
            infer_instance)).symm
        exact ⟨rfl⟩
      · rw [← LinearMap.ker_eq_bot, Submodule.subsingleton_iff_eq_bot] at this; exact this.1
      · rw [← LinearMap.range_eq_top, ← Submodule.Quotient.subsingleton_iff] at this; exact this.2

rw [Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_isIso_on_height_one]
  intro p hp
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  have : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  exact (Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M)).trans
    ((Submodule.torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M).prod
      (LocalizedModule.quotientEquiv S (Submodule.torsion A M))).symm

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_localized_isomorphic fun p hp ↦ ⟨?_⟩
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  have : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty p) (Set.finite_singleton p)).2
  refine (Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (LocalizedModule S M)).trans (LinearEquiv.prodCongr ?_ ?_)
  · exact (Submodule.torsionLocalized S M).symm
  · exact (LocalizedModule.quotientEquiv S (Submodule.torsion A M)).trans
      (Submodule.Quotient.equiv (Submodule.torsionLocalized S M) (LinearEquiv.refl _ _))

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_iso_at_primeHeight_eq_one fun p hp ↦ Nonempty.intro ?_
  let P := p.1.primeCompl
  let S := Localization P
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing S := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) ⟨p, rfl⟩ (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  let T := Submodule.torsion A M
  let Q := M ⧸ T
  let M' := LocalizedModule P M
  let T' := LocalizedModule P T
  let Q' := LocalizedModule P Q
  let f : M' →ₗ[S] Q' := LocalizedModule.map P (Submodule.mkQ T)
  let g : T' →ₗ[S] M' := LocalizedModule.map P (Submodule.subtype T)
  have hQ_tf : Module.IsTorsionFree S Q' := LocalizedModule.isTorsionFree_localization_of_isTorsionFree P Q
    (Module.isTorsionFree_quotient_torsion A M)
  haveI : Module.Free S Q' := Module.free_of_torsion_free' (R := S) (M := Q')
  let s : Q' →ₗ[S] M' := Module.Free.chooseSection f (LocalizedModule.map_surjective P _ (Submodule.mkQ_surjective T))
  have h_split : f.comp s = LinearMap.id := Module.Free.chooseSection_comp_right _ _
  refine (LinearEquiv.ofLeftSplit g s (LocalizedModule.map_exact P _ _ (Submodule.torsion_subtype_exact A M)) h_split).trans
    (LocalizedModule.prodEquiv P T Q).symm

rw [Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_nonempty_linearEquiv_localizedModule]
  intro p hp
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp) ⟨p, rfl⟩
      (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  exact ⟨(Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M)).trans
    (LinearEquiv.prodCongr (Submodule.torsion_localizedModule p.1.primeCompl M).symm
      (Submodule.quotient_torsion_localizedModule p.1.primeCompl M).symm)⟩

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isomorphic_on_height_one_spectrum _ _ fun p hp ↦ ⟨?_⟩
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa) ⟨p, rfl⟩ (by simp)).2
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := Module.exists_isCompl_torsion (LocalizedModule S M)
  refine (Submodule.prodEquivOfIsCompl _ _ hN).trans (LinearEquiv.prod ?_ ?_)
  · exact (Submodule.torsionLocalized S M).symm
  · refine hN.quotientEquiv.symm.trans ((LocalizedModule.quotientEquiv S _).symm.trans ?_)
    exact LinearEquiv.ofEq _ _ (Submodule.torsionLocalized_range_eq S M)

refine Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_locally_isomorphic _ _ fun p hp ↦ ?_
  let S := p.1.primeCompl
  haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) :=
    (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization {p} (by simpa using hp)
      (Set.singleton_nonempty _) (Set.finite_singleton _)).2
  exact ⟨(Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M)).trans
    (LinearEquiv.prodCongr (Module.torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M).symm
      (Module.quotient_torsion_localizedModule_equiv S M).symm)⟩

let T := Submodule.torsion A M
  let s := {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1} ∩ Module.support A T
  have hs : s.Finite := Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support (Submodule.torsion_isTorsion A M)
  let S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl
  have hS : S ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := fun x hx ↦ by
    simp_rw [Submonoid.mem_iInf] at hx
    by_contra h; rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | ⟨p, hp⟩
    · simpa using Module.IsTorsion.subset_zero_support (Submodule.torsion_isTorsion A M) h
    · exact p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors (hx p hp) h
  haveI : IsLocalization S (Localization S) := inferInstance
  let M' := LocalizedModule S M
  let T' := LocalizedModule S T
  let Q' := LocalizedModule S (M ⧸ T)
  let e : M' ≃ₗ[Localization S] T' × Q' := by
    rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | hne
    · refine LinearEquiv.prodZero (Localization S) T' Q' |>.trans
        (LinearEquiv.prodCongrLeft (fun _ ↦ ?_)) |>.symm
      rw [LocalizedModule.zero_iff_support_disjoint S T, Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty,
        Submodule.torsion_isTorsion A M |>.support_eq_empty_iff_eq_bot |>.not]
      rw [← Set.inter_inter_distrib_right]
      by_contra h; obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 h
      exact Set.not_mem_empty p (hp.1.2.2 ⟨hp.1.1, hp.2⟩)
    · haveI := (HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s Set.inter_subset_left hne hs).2
      haveI : Module.Free (Localization S) Q' := Module.free_of_torsion_free' fun x hx ↦ by
        obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := LocalizedModule.mk_surjective S x
        rw [LocalizedModule.mk_eq_zero] at hx; obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := hx
        rw [Submodule.Quotient.mk_eq_zero, Submodule.mem_torsion] at hc
        obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := hc; use d * c
        simp [mul_smul, hd, nonZeroDivisors.mul_mem d.2 (hS c.2)]
      exact (Submodule.localized_exact S _ _ (Submodule.torsion_subset_ker_mkQ A M)
        (Submodule.ker_mkQ_subset_torsion A M) (Submodule.mkQ_surjective _)).split
  exact Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_of_isIso_localization S e fun p hp ↦ by
    rw [Submonoid.mem_iInf] at hp; exact fun q hq ↦ hp q hq.2
